This snippet demonstrates the conversion layer used in the Gambit–SageMath bridge prototype.  The SageNormalFormGame dataclass represents a normal-form game using NumPy payoff matrices. The to_gambit_game() method converts this representation into a Gambit-compatible game object, enabling Gambit’s Nash equilibrium solvers to operate directly on SageMath-style game structures.  This abstraction layer is central to the interoperability between SageMath computational workflows and Gambit’s equilibrium computation engine.
